notes: Fixed 5 HIGH-severity data integrity issues in lead router: S5 (status drop), S6 (threshold mismatch), S7 (sortBy injection), W4 (schema key mismatch), D5 (missing Lead 360 fields). All changes scoped to lead entity. Pre-existing test failures in 22 router tests (missing leadActivity mock) and 1 typecheck error (TrashList.tsx) are NOT related to IFC-239.
